question: Does the image feature realistic photography with cold winter color tones?
Is the image presented in a horizontal composition?
Is there a silver-gray train stopped on the left side of the frame with closed doors?
Are there fine snow specks on the train body and are the windows slightly fogged?
Does the platform ground to the right of the train have a distinct light gray cement texture?
Is there a bright cyan-green safety line with thin frost running through the foreground?
Is there a dark blue metal bench in the center of the frame with a layer of fine frost on the seat?
Are there exactly 3 suitcases arranged front-to-back at the left end of the bench?
Is the foremost suitcase transparent with the empty interior visible?
Are the two suitcases behind the transparent one dark gray and black respectively, with visible scratches?
Are all suitcases standing upright, and does the dark gray one have its telescopic handle fully extended?
Are there exactly 2 backpacks lying flat on the right side of the bench?
Is one backpack black with a half-open zipper showing orange lining, and the other khaki with the zipper closed?
Are there exactly 3 paper coffee cups arranged in a triangle on the ground in front of the bench?
Is the left cup white with a black lid, the right cup mirror-silver, and the middle cup dark brown with a white lid?
Is there light steam rising from the openings of the coffee cups?
Are there exactly 2 newspapers (one gray-white, one light blue) spread on the ground to the right of the cups?
Is there a red vending machine with visible buttons and slots placed against the wall in the right-center?
Is there an electronic timetable screen displaying colored rectangular bars on the wall to the left of the vending machine?
Is there a black cylindrical trash bin with a visible plastic liner positioned below the timetable?
Are there exactly 2 blank poster frames with silver frames arranged vertically in the right foreground?
Are there exactly 2 adults standing behind the bench (one in green coat/cream scarf facing left, one in gray jacket/black hat facing train)?
Are there exactly 2 children standing inside the safety line (one in red jacket/blue cap looking up, one in blue jacket/white earmuffs)?
Is there a gray baby stroller with the canopy half-closed parked behind and to the right of the children?
Are there exactly 7 pigeons standing inside the safety line in the lower right corner?
Do the pigeons consist of exactly 2 gray, 1 light pink, and 4 gray-and-white patterned ones?
Are all the pigeons' heads facing toward the paper cups?
Is the platform exit visible in the far right background with falling snow and blurry city lights?
